"E:\Program Files\Other\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\program.dir/objects.a
"E:\Program Files\Other\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\program.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\program.dir\objects1.rsp
"E:\Program Files\Other\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe" -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\program.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o program.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libprogram.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\program.dir\linkLibs.rsp
